steps.title: Set the height to zero
steps.content:
An $x$-intercept occurs where $y=0$. Since $y=g(x)$, solve the equation
$$\frac{5}{8}x-30=0$$

steps.title: Solve for the intercept
steps.content:
Add $30$ to both sides, then multiply by $\frac{8}{5}$ to undo the coefficient of $x$.
$$\frac{5}{8}x=30$$
$$x=30\cdot\frac{8}{5}$$
$$x=48$$
The answer is 48.
